response.original_title: What happens if Qantas cancels my flight Money  Save
response.overview: If Qantas cancels your flight, 📑+61✈︎1800✈︎868✈︎633 they will usually rebook you on the next available service or provide a refund. For longer delays, you may also receive meals, accommodation, or other travel assistance. UK: +44-800-054-8541. MX: +52-800-351-0319.
